notes.anchor: he will nominate five new prefects each year on the ground of their exemption from jury service
notes.note: A military prefecture (praefectura) carried exemption from serving on Roman juries; Pompey's promise to appoint five such honorary prefects annually was a means of obliging friends with the privilege without real duties.

notes.anchor: on 22 May I was setting out for Brundisium
notes.note: The Latin gives the date as the eleventh day before the Kalends of June (a. d. xi Kal. Iunias), reckoned inclusively as 22 May 51 BC.
